feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MESSAGE Unable to resolve plug-in "com.sap.adt.ddic.table.ui" ADT Eclipse Connect to SAP BTP
entry.content:
when trying to connect Eclipse to SAP BTP via ADT  it says

 

Failed to get service instance URL info for https://XXX.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com: java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException:

Using Eclipse version 2024|09 or Version 4.33

I have first posted my question in Eclipse forum, but as "That looks like an issue with ADT connecting to a service endpoint run by SAP, so either way, it's either something ephemeral
that will resolve itself, or you'll need to reach out to SAP for support."

So, now I am asking for help.

it seems related to the last update a couple of weeks ago. The "create an ABAP cloud project" is not letting me to input the whole file with my service keys, instead if asking for "Extract the URL from the service key and afterwards popping-out the error above: "Failed to get service instance URL info for"

I have found the error subject in  the log in Eclipse

MESSAGE Unable to resolve plug-in "com.sap.adt.ddic.table.ui

If you see in the attachment it is true that his plugin is missing

is there a way to uninstall only this plugin?

Is this the correct place to ask about ADT?

is ADT under the scope of SAP or Eclipse?

entry.title: How do I read an FTP server file from a BTP ABAP environment?
entry.content: I have one client requirement , to read file from FTP Server in BTP ABAP environment.

entry.title: internal table data not getting reflected in adobe form when calling from driver program
entry.content:
I have created adobe form and calling adobe form from the driver program. I have issue in moving data of internal table lt_zmatvaliditem of custom table from
report program into the adobe form internal table gt_zmatvaliditem .
Before calling of the adobe form , I can see 10 records in the internal table lt_zmatvaliditem.
In debugging mode when the control jumps into the code initialization I have metioned the internal table in import and export parameters.

I can see in debugging mode gt_zmatvaliditem no. of records is zero.

Things I have checked ::
I have created structure in DDIC ZSTMATVALIDITEM and table type ZTTMATVALIDITEM with same structure.
This table type I have mentioned in import parameters gt_zmatvaliditem type ZTTMATVALIDITEM.

I don't think other than this any other thing needs to be done . I was expecting gt_zmatvaliditem with 10 records which is not reflecting.

can some one tell me what could be stopping the movement of data between internal table of report program lt_zmatvaliditem and adobe form gt_zmatvaliditem .

 

is there any  issue in this structure. I have checked it with database table only mandt is not mentioned here.

Pleae help me as I have to submit by the end of the day.

entry.title: Urgent - handling units are missing in vekp/vepo tables but available in document flow of a delivery
entry.content:
We are receiving an inbound idoc to post goods issue using the message type - SHP_OBDLV_CONFIRM_DECENTRAL.

FM used is BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC.

Idoc is getting processed successfully but handling units are not getting created in the tables VEKP and VEPO.

But we can see the handling units in the document flow of a delivery.

We tried to debug it multiple times, couldnt find any error .

entry.title: ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0 vs ABAP Core Development Tools 3.46.0
entry.content:
Dear Community, do you know how to contact with the developers of ADT?
the ABAP Core Development Tools 3.46.0 has no option to enter service key
However the previous one ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0
It had a way to enter your service key
Compare these 2 print screen

I am not able to connect to my BTP Trial account since then.

Is there a way to downgrade the tools or correct the new ones?

entry.title: Custom RAP Application Deployment to SAP S/4 HANA Public Edition Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I have created a custom rap application in ADT and exposed it to OData V4 and from Business Application studio I have deployed the application to Development Tenant.

Then I created IAM App and Business Catalog and assigned IAM App to business catalog.

Later I created a Custom Business Role and assigned the catalog which I created in ADT by assigning IAM application to it and assigned to Business Users and also in Business Catalogs tile I can see my catalog

But I am unable to see the Custom RAP Application in System..

Kindly Help to achieve.

Thanks in Advance. 

Regards,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Opentext with an external pdf
entry.content: hi, i want to use Opentext to read a pdf from an external source, how can i implement it in SAP BTP?

entry.title: How to delete not-existing objects on a cloud system?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have an issue with deletion objects on the cloud system. Whenever I try to delete an object that I haven't used, the system raises an error. How can I delete these objects?

Thanks in advice. 

Regards,

entry.title: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you're having a good day!
Just wanted to ask how do you convert an integer to hexadecimal?
Currently I have this line of code.

DATA(lt_tabix) = sy-tabix.

which is then used to compare a hexadecimal value.

LOOP AT lt_table ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_var>) WHERE hex = lt_tabix

It will give me an error since 10 is not 0000000000000010 in hexa.
Really appreciate your replies in advance.

entry.title: Authorization to create CDS views
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can someone please provide if the below auth. are sufficient to create CDS view on HANA DB. If not, please rectify and/or suggest the correct ones

  • REPO.READ
  • REPO.EDIT_NATIVE_OBJECTS
  • REPO.ACTIVATE_NATIVE_OBJECTS
  • REPO.MAINTAIN_NATIVE_PACKAGESSystem privileges
  • REPO.MAINTAIN_DELIVERY_UNITSObject privileges
  • EXECUTE privilege on the database procedure SYS.REPOSITORY_REST.

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization
entry.content:
How can I get around this error: Service broker error: Service broker hana-broker failed with: Can not create service instance: There is no database available. Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization. 

I need to create an instance to continue the tutotial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-analytics-cloud-consume-1.html
But are not able to follow after step Create SAP HANA database project because of this error in starting the database project. 
I have read many post in community with similar situation, but the solution given dont work form me as I am using a trial account (the tutorial should work with it) 

Any insight are appreciated

entry.title: Long text not reflecting in IW33
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using a bdc program for IW36 to create an order. Once the order is created, I am using fm SAVE_TEXT to update long text. When I go to IW33, my long text is truncated to 40 characters. But in SE37, fm READ_TEXT is returning me the long text. Can anyone tell me why I am unable to see the long text in IW33? I can see lt_otext contains 6 lines. Below is my code for reference.

          ls_oheader-tdid = 'KOPF'.
          ls_oheader-tdobject = 'AUFK'.
          lv_suborder = |{ lv_suborder ALPHA = IN }|.
          ls_oheader-tdname = |{ sy-mandt }{ lv_suborder }|.
          ls_oheader-tdspras = sy-langu.
          ls_oheader-tdform = 'SYSTEM'.
          ls_oheader-tdlinesize = 072.
          ls_oheader-tdtxtlines = lv_count.

          CALL FUNCTION 'SAVE_TEXT'
            EXPORTING
              client          = sy-mandt
              header          = ls_oheader
*              insert          = 'X'
              savemode_direct = 'X'
*             keep_last_changed = abap_true
            TABLES
              lines           = lt_otext
            EXCEPTIONS
              id              = 1
              language        = 2
              name            = 3
              object          = 4
              OTHERS          = 5.
          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            COMMIT WORK.
          ENDIF.

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: How to to upload multiple image files in SAP RAP Application?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to upload multiple image files in the SAP RAP Application, but currently, I can only upload them one by one.

Is it possible to upload multiple files at once? If so, how can I achieve this?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: btp - Error in xml not appearing
entry.content:
The file structure is as shown in the picture.

 

My screen now looks like this.

Currently, if I click the menu in project1, the xml screen of project2 does not appear and there is no response.
I hope that when I click the menu in project1, the xml of project2 will be displayed.
I don't know if it went wrong in the manifest or somewhere else,
Please look at my xml, controller, and manifest below and let me know if there are any mistakes.

I attached the files as txt files. Please refer to this.

entry.title: Issue in Badi Implementation for Purchase Requisition Item.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a custom field in the purchase requisition item level and I want the custom field to fetch the data from sales order item level . I have used the BADI "MM_PUR_S4_PR_MODIFY_ITEM" for this case and it is not working for the PR which are  automatically generated. 

I have created a Custom CDS view using I_SALESORDERITEM and I_SALESOREDERSCHEDULELINE and I have enabled the sales order data that needs to be sent to the PR custom field and also PR number keeping sales order number in the association.

I have used this Custom CDS view in the badi.

If I create a new PR then these changes are visible but creating PR without sales will not get the desired data from sales order item level .

Thanks In Advance

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Custom form template is not available in another client of dev environment
entry.content: I have been working on PO based custom form template. I created a custom form template in DEV100 client but its not available in DEV200 client. Normally all the workbench objects are already available in the different client of same environment but I am unable to find custom form templates created via Manage form template app.

entry.title: Inner join with AND , OR and LIKE in where clause select query
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

               When I am using the multiple OR clauses in where condition for individual tables it is working fine but when using the multiple OR  clauses with inner join in where clause it is only considering the first condition. 

The following is the code which helps you understand better.

 

    if lt_bsad is not initial.
      select rbukrs,
             gjahr,
             belnr,
             wsl,
             augbl,
             gkont from acdoca into table @LT_acdoca
        for all entries in @LT_bsad where rbukrs = @LT_bsad-bukrs and
                                          gjahr  = @LT_bsad-gjahr and
                                          augbl  = @LT_bsad-augbl and
                                          rldnr  = '0L'.

    endif.

    if lt_acdoca is not initial.
      select spras,
             saknr,
             txt50 from skat into table @DATA(lt_skat)
        for all entries in @LT_acdoca where saknr = @LT_acdoca-gkont and
                                            txt50 like '%TDS%' or
                                            txt50 like '%CASH DISCOUNT%' or
                                            txt50 like '%GBI%' or
                                            txt50 like '%CUF%' and
                                            spras = 'E'.
    endif.

 The above code is picking 6 records each in lt_acdoca and lt_skat which is absolutely correct. 
But I want to get the inner join of both acdoca and skat so that I can pick the acdoca-wsl from acdoca to pass it in final internal table based on txt50 as shown above.
The below is the select query with inner join of the above two tables.

    select acdoca~rbukrs,
           acdoca~gjahr,
           acdoca~belnr,
           acdoca~wsl,
           acdoca~augbl,
           acdoca~gkont,
           skat~spras,
           skat~saknr,
           skat~txt50
         from acdoca as acdoca inner join skat as skat
     on skat~saknr = acdoca~gkont
      into table @DATA(lt_acdoca_skat)
    for all entries in @LT_bsad where  acdoca~rbukrs = @LT_bsad-bukrs and
                                        acdoca~gjahr  = @LT_bsad-gjahr and
                                        acdoca~augbl  = @LT_bsad-augbl and
                                        acdoca~rldnr  = '0L' and
                                        skat~spras = 'E' and
                                        ( skat~txt50 like '%TDS%' or
                                          skat~txt50 like '%CASH DISCOUNT%' 
                                                                     or
                                         skat~txt50 like '%GBI%' or
                                          skat~txt50 like '%CUF%'
                                         ).
*

Now it is giving the result with 'TDS' only . But I want the lt_acdoca_skat with 'GBI' , 'CUF', 'CASH DISCOUNT' also.

The below is the image of 6 records in lt_skat

The below is the one record with the TDS. So it is taking the first condition of TDS and skipping the others.

I want the lt_acdoca_skat with all 6 records of lt_acdoca and lt_skat .

How can I achieve it  ?

entry.title: Invalid char # replacement
entry.content:
I am retrieving some binary data from a table, decompressing and then converting to string with code page 0160, but I have issues with accented characters as it does not get recognized. Have tried multiple codepages (present in TCP00) but without any luck. 


Is there any workaround for this?

 

TRY.
    cl_abap_gzip=>decompress_binary(
      EXPORTING
        gzip_in     = lv_xstring
        gzip_in_len = -1
      IMPORTING
        raw_out     = lv_xstring
    ).

  CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_range.
  CATCH cx_sy_buffer_overflow.
  CATCH cx_sy_compression_error.
ENDTRY.

DATA(rv_data) = cl_bcs_convert=>xstring_to_string(
  iv_xstr = lv_xstring
  iv_cp   = '0120' ).

entry.title: BTP Platform roles and CTM
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have 2 different questions :

1. How to assign BTP Platform role (subaccount Viewer or destination administrator) to user via IAS as we cannot do role mapping in Trust configuration for Custom Platform identity Provider. do we already have a solution for this ? or its manually ? 

2. Is it possible to import custom role collection via Cloud transport Management ?

entry.title: Regarding the integration between SSAM 2310 and Microsoft PowerApps
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have integrated Microsoft Power Apps with SSAM 2310. Currently, when the button is clicked, the Power Apps open in the browser using utilsModule.openUrl(url), and it works fine.

However, our requirement is to open Power Apps within SSAM, similar to an MDK page view, instead of opening outside of SSAM.

Could you please provide suggestions or alternative methods to achieve this task?

Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud
